title: When Friendship Is the Real Love Story
description:
Sometimes, long term friendships reach a moment of reckoning. I’m not talking about your work friends, or that roommate you swore to keep in touch with but never found the time. I’m talking about your chosen family. The people you thought would never leave you. When they do—or you do—something big shatters inside. Maybe this […]

The post When Friendship Is the Real Love Story appeared first on
hook: When your chosen family leaves, the betrayal rewrites years of history. A reckoning with friendship's fragility.

title: My Mother Died On Screen But Survived Hollywood
description: "Making sense of a complicated family legacy."
hook: Her mother's death played out on camera while the family fought for survival in an industry built on exploitation.

title: What remains
description:
In an ingenious restoration project, the humble oyster shell is transformed into a powerful tool to halt coastal erosion

- by Aeon Video

Watch
hook: Oysters are cleaning New York's waterways back to life—a quiet restoration that tastes like the harbor's future.

title: A Hope for a Minotaur
description: This, too, is the condition of festival-speak. I pick some films over others because the framework of my experience is not experiential; it is exegetical. I organize myself around opinions I am going to have about things I have not yet seen.
hook: You've been organizing your opinions before experiencing anything. A sharp critique of how we consume culture.

title: Trevor Winkfield’s Cheerfully Sinister Worlds
description: His rejection of certainty is an urgent reminder that imagination should not be neglected in the pursuit of art.
hook: Trevor Winkfield paints possibility into worlds where certainty has no place. A radical defense of imagination over answers.

title: The Pain Is the Point: On the Violent Realities of Capitalist Sport
description:
In 2022, critical sports scholar Chen Chen uncovered a staggering statistic: The three leading academic journals in sports management (Journal of Sport Management, Sport Management Review, and European Sport Management Quarterly), with over 74 years of combined history between them, had published a grand total of 14 articles that mentioned the word “capitalism” more than […]

The post
hook: Sports journals have ignored the bodies breaking inside stadiums. A scholar uncovers decades of willful blindness.

title: Beating Heart: Discovering the Cinema of Kyrgyzstan
description: Inside the grassroots community of programmers, critics and filmmakers working for the Bishkek International Film Festival who aim to put Kyrgyzstan on the cinematic map.
hook: In Bishkek, a scrappy community of programmers is forcing their country's cinema into existence through sheer will.
